title: 5 Signing a Bill Payment Remittance Processing Agreement
body_text:
5	Signing a Bill Payment Remittance Processing Agreement
5.1	Signing a Bill Payment Remittance Processing Agreement
Your Financial institution must sign an agreement with your provincial central to offer BPRP. Your financial institution signs the agreement once. A new agreement is not required for each new Corporate Creditor. Individuals with contractual signing authority must sign the agreement. The requirements for agreements vary by province:
BC Financial Institutions
â BC financial institutions who have BPRP listed in their service agreement are not required to sign a separate agreement with Central 1.
Ontario Financial Institutions
â Complete the CCIN Bill Payment Agreement, Form 2668.
Financial Institutions in Other Provinces
â Contact your provincial central.
Send the agreement as described in Chapter 7, Sending BPRP Service Requests. A signed copy will be returned to your financial institution. Allow 7 to 10 business days for processing.
Related Information
CCIN Bill Payment Agreement,
Form 2668
END
